transcript: Voiceover: Every champion starts somewhere. Usually a little unsure, a little unprepared. The first attempts are never perfect. But showing up, that's what matters. Athletes practice for years for moments that last seconds. What takes seconds to witness takes a lifetime to prepare. No dream goes global without practice and determination. Speaker A: Duolingo English Test. Proud supporters of dreamers and doers!
on_screen_text: Every champion starts somewhere. Usually a little unsure, a little unprepared. The first attempts are never perfect. But showing up, that's what matters. Athletes practice for years for moments that last seconds. What takes seconds to witness takes a lifetime to prepare. No dream goes global without practice and determination. duolingo english test. Dream. Practice. Win. Accepted Worldwide. Take unlimited PRACTICE TESTS
summary: The ad features Olympic champion Neeraj Chopra comparing athletic training to preparing for the Duolingo English Test. It emphasizes that global success requires consistent practice and determination. The call to action invites users to take unlimited practice tests.
